items.title: Supporting Stability and Resilience in Kyrgyzstan: UK statement to the OSCE, July 2026
items.content_text: The UK welcomed the OSCE Programme Office in Bishkek’s work supporting Kyrgyzstan’s stability, resilience and development. The Office’s contributions to border security, democratic governance, human rights, economic resilience and regional co-operation demonstrated the value of the OSCE’s field presence.
